name: age
label: Age
clinical_note: Older age is generally associated with higher cardiovascular risk.

name: sex
label: Sex
description: Recorded biological sex in the source dataset.
clinical_note: Sex can reflect baseline risk differences and historical referral patterns.

name: cp
label: Chest pain type
clinical_note: Asymptomatic or atypical presentations may carry different risk patterns in these benchmark datasets.

name: trestbps
label: Resting blood pressure
description: Resting systolic blood pressure in mm Hg.
clinical_note: Higher resting blood pressure is a recognized cardiovascular risk marker.

name: chol
label: Serum cholesterol
clinical_note: Elevated cholesterol may contribute to cardiovascular risk, although this dataset has measurement and provenance limitations.

name: fbs
label: Fasting blood sugar > 120 mg/dL
clinical_note: Hyperglycemia can co-occur with metabolic cardiovascular risk.

name: restecg
label: Resting ECG
clinical_note: Abnormal ECG findings may influence predicted risk.

name: thalach
label: Maximum heart rate achieved
clinical_note: Lower achieved heart rate can indicate reduced exercise tolerance in this dataset.

name: exang
label: Exercise-induced angina
clinical_note: Exercise-induced angina is often a strong risk signal in these data.

name: oldpeak
label: ST depression
description: ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest.
clinical_note: Higher ST depression can indicate ischemic changes.

name: slope
label: ST segment slope
description: Slope of the peak exercise ST segment.
clinical_note: Flat or downsloping ST segments may be associated with higher risk.

name: ca
label: Major vessels
description: Number of major vessels colored by fluoroscopy.
clinical_note: More affected vessels can be associated with disease, but missingness is substantial outside Cleveland.

name: thal
label: Thalassemia / stress test result
description: Thalassemia/stress-test result coding in the source data.
clinical_note: Reversible defect often contributes strongly in Cleveland-style datasets.
